name: intransparency
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) manifest for InTransparency — the verified skill graph of European higher education. Drop-in for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Zed, or any MCP-aware host.

stdio.notes: Download mcp-server.js once, then set args to its local path. No credentials needed — all endpoints are public read-only.

tools.name: intransparency_search_companies
tools.description: Search public company profiles by keyword, industry, size, or region. Returns companies that are publicly discoverable on InTransparency.

tools.name: intransparency_lookup_company
tools.description: Fetch a single company by slug (stable URL identifier). Returns full profile including hiring practices, industries, locations.

tools.name: intransparency_search_jobs
tools.description: Search active jobs across the platform, filter by location, type, skills, or company.

tools.name: intransparency_lookup_job
tools.description: Fetch a single job by id. Returns full listing including required skills (ESCO), location, stage/tirocinio type, and application link.

tools.name: intransparency_verify_credential
tools.description: Verify a W3C Verifiable Credential issued by InTransparency. Input: a credential token. Output: cryptographic verification + issuer + subject.

tools.name: intransparency_resolve_esco
tools.description: Resolve a free-text skill or occupation to its canonical ESCO (European Skills/Competences) code. Useful to standardize user inputs.

tools.name: intransparency_get_algorithms
tools.description: Return the public algorithm registry — model cards for every ranking / matching model used by the platform, with inputs/weights/exclusions per AI Act.

tools.name: intransparency_get_glossary
tools.description: Fetch the glossary of domain terms (Italian stage vocabulary, Bologna ECTS, ESCO, etc.).

tools.name: intransparency_get_changelog
tools.description: Return the platform changelog — ordered list of shipped product updates.

tools.name: intransparency_get_facts
tools.description: Return machine-readable facts & benchmarks about the InTransparency platform (skills catalog size, students, universities, etc.) for citation.
